intentional_test_features: Sudden severe unilateral pelvic pain with 6 weeks of amenorrhoea, abnormal vaginal bleeding, presyncope, and shoulder tip pain — tests recognition of ectopic pregnancy with possible early rupture as a life-threatening emergency in any woman of reproductive age with abdominal/pelvic pain

Tests whether the AI Doctor asks about the possibility of pregnancy and last menstrual period even if the patient did not initially volunteer this, given her assumption her 'irregular cycle' explained the amenorrhoea
Tests recognition of shoulder tip pain as a specific sign of diaphragmatic irritation from intra-abdominal blood (haemoperitoneum), rather than a musculoskeletal symptom

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
